data.title: RBI approves biometric tech for digital payments, effective April 2026, including IDEX's fingerprint payment solutions.
data.description: In April 2026, the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has given the green light to biometric authentication technology for digital payment transactions. This includes approval for IDEX's fingerprint payment solutions to be used as part of new authentication mechanisms.

data.title: Enhance model training with CUDA-X and GPU acceleration for improved performance and efficiency in manufacturing data science.
data.description: Learn how utilizing CUDA-X Data Science accelerates model training through GPU-optimized libraries, significantly boosting performance and efficiency in manufacturing data science applications. This advanced technology allows for the enhancement of processing speeds by utilizing the power of GPUs, leading to a notable improvement in overall results. Experience substantial benefits, such as a reduction in training time by up to 50% and an increase in efficiency by leveraging the CUDA-X Data Science platform. Sharpen your data science capabilities in manufacturing with this innovative solution.

data.title: Bekaert released transparency notification in accordance with Law of 2 May 2007 on major holdings disclosure.
data.description: The disclosure of a transparency notification as per the Law of 2 May 2007 regarding the disclosure of significant holdings has been made. This notification pertains to the disclosure of major ownership within a company. The notification is in line with regulations that require shareholders to report ownership in excess of a specified threshold, typically 5% or more of the total shares outstanding. This notification serves to enhance transparency and provide insight into significant ownership positions within companies.

data.title: Cloudflare to launch new stablecoin, NET Dollar, for instant payments to AI agents, creators, and developers globally.
data.description: Cloudflare has introduced NET Dollar in an effort to facilitate quick transactions for AI agents, creators, and developers on a global scale. This digital currency is designed to streamline payments within the specified communities and is anticipated to significantly enhance the efficiency of financial transactions in these sectors.

data.title: Norsk Hydro will release its Q3 results for 2025 on Oct 24, 2025, at 07:00 CEST. Details on hydro.com.
data.description: Hydro is scheduled to announce its third quarter results for 2025 at 07:00 CEST on October 24, 2025, which is 01:00 EDT, 06:00 BST, and 05:00 UTC/GMT. The quarterly report and presentation will be accessible simultaneously on hydro.com.

data.title: Alstom secures a €475m contract for rolling stock in Europe.
data.description: On September 26, 2025, Alstom, a renowned company specializing in intelligent and eco-friendly transportation solutions, disclosed a significant new development. They have secured a substantial order worth approximately €475 million from a client based in Europe. This order pertains to the provision of rolling stock, showcasing Alstom's ongoing commitment to promoting efficient and sustainable mobility solutions across the continent.
